Pune.

Pune is a city in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is the administrative headquarters of the Pune district and is known for being one of the largest IT hubs in India, as well as a major automobile and manufacturing hub. Pune is often referred to as the "Oxford of the East" due to its numerous educational institutions. The city has a rich history, having been ruled by various dynasties, including the Rashtrakuta dynasty, the Mughals, and the Maratha Empire. Today, Pune is a major cultural centre and is home to many historical landmarks, such as Shaniwarwada and Vishrambaug Wada. The city has a population of around 7.2 million people in the metropolitan region, making it the seventh-most populous metropolitan area in India.

Can you tell me about salman khan?

Salman Khan is an Indian actor, film producer, and television personality who predominantly works in Hindi films. He was born on 27 December 1965. Along with Shah Rukh Khan and Aamir Khan, he is one of the three most successful male stars of Bollywood since the 1990s. Salman Khan has been active in the film industry for over three decades and has evolved from a charming romantic hero to a powerhouse of talent and philanthropy. He has been known for his charismatic presence in Bollywood and has had a significant impact on the Indian film industry.
